abilities.name: swarm
abilities.description: Strengthens bug moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

effectChanges.description: Increases the frequency of cries heard on the overworld if any party Pokémon has this ability.

abilities.name: early-bird
abilities.description: Makes sleep pass twice as quickly.

abilities.name: rattled
abilities.description: Raises Speed one stage upon being hit by a dark, ghost, or bug move.
